name: cisely
description: Model your company as a living context graph in Cisely — mission, beliefs, strategy, initiatives, and metrics, and the personas, contexts, stakeholders, goals, and expectations it serves. Guided modeling over the Cisely MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Model your company as a living context graph over the Cisely MCP.
interface.longDescription: Cisely teaches your agent to model a company's context graph — the response side (mission, beliefs, strategy, initiatives, metrics) and the demand side (personas, operating contexts, stakeholders, goals, expectations) — by driving the Cisely MCP with the right discipline and order. Requires a Cisely workspace (app.cisely.dev) and the connected cisely MCP server.
defaultPrompt: Let's model my company in Cisely.
Map our personas and the goals they're trying to reach.
